title: Cosmic Vibration Perception
definition: The ability to perceive low-frequency vibrations in the universe that others cannot.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A person who can feel a low, constant hum from the universe through his leg bone instead of hearing it like most people.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: An individual with an unusual sense that allows him to perceive vibrations in the cosmos below the human audible range via his femur.
difficulty_levels.expert: A unique faculty enabling an individual to detect low-frequency vibrations within the universe through a special sensitivity in his femur bone, potentially connected to undiscovered dimensions of physics.

extra_fields.insight: The uncommon ability to perceive cosmic vibrations as a new form of sensory perception.
